---
title: "ObservableJS Example"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)

```


```{r}
#| include: false

ds <- read_csv("data/fruits_long.csv")
ojs_define(data = ds)

```


```{ojs}

viewof selected_diet = Inputs.select(
  ["omnivore", "vegetarian"],
  {label: "Diet type:"}
)

ds_filtered = transpose(data).filter(
  d => d.diet_type === selected_diet
)

```


```{ojs}

Plot.plot({
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(
      ds_filtered, 
      Plot.groupY(
        {x: "count"}, 
        {y: "fruit", sort: {y: "x", reverse: true}}
      )
    )
  ],
  x: {label: "Count"},
  y: {label: "Fruit"},
  marginLeft: 120
})

```
